raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The excerpt is structured around explicit contribution claims (new failure mode, deployment-gap framework, generalisation beyond V2G); verifying that the thesis and gap statement are internally coherent is central to any substantive check.","R1.2":"The three-observation chain is the load-bearing argumentative spine; the logical soundness of each premise-to-intermediate-to-conclusion transition and their collective coherence must be assessed.","R1.3":"Quantitative claims (≈90% training commitment, collapse across all three markets) and the mechanistic attribution to horizon truncation and state resets are asserted without the supporting tables or figures being present in the artifact, making evidence-claim alignment a live concern."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus on intellectual substance — whether the three-observation argument is logically valid, empirical claims are adequately grounded, and novelty assertions hold against prior safe-RL work — or primarily on prose quality and writing clarity?"}

rationale.R1.1: The excerpt is structured around explicit contribution claims (new failure mode, deployment-gap framework, generalisation beyond V2G); verifying that the thesis and gap statement are internally coherent is central to any substantive check.
rationale.R1.2: The three-observation chain is the load-bearing argumentative spine; the logical soundness of each premise-to-intermediate-to-conclusion transition and their collective coherence must be assessed.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative claims (≈90% training commitment, collapse across all three markets) and the mechanistic attribution to horizon truncation and state resets are asserted without the supporting tables or figures being present in the artifact, making evidence-claim alignment a live concern.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on intellectual substance — whether the three-observation argument is logically valid, empirical claims are adequately grounded, and novelty assertions hold against prior safe-RL work — or primarily on prose quality and writing clarity?
